title: Coordinator Protocol: explicit contract between spec-graph and external coordinators
description: Add coordinator-protocol.md and next_step field to dispatch manifest. spec-graph stays neutral (no LLM API calls, no embedded sub-agent dispatch), but now provides an explicit protocol for external coordinators (Claude Code, Codex, any AI agent) to consume dispatch manifests. The protocol covers: reading the manifest, dispatching sub-agents via Agent tool, handling meetings (broadcast model, dynamic rounds, expert invitation), running next_step commands to advance the workflow, and looping back to dispatch. Adds next_step field to DispatchAction so coordinators know exactly what to run after sub-agent completion.

audit_log.message: coordinator protocol designed, implementing next_step field + protocol doc + tests
coordinator-protocol.md + next_step field in dispatch manifest + 3 new tests. 360/360 tests pass. spec-graph stays neutral, external coordinator consumes manifest per protocol
